title: AN ACT TO AMEND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY HUNDRED EIGHTY-NINE, ENTITLED "AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR ASSISTANCE TO THE  GOLD MINING INDUSTRY."

chunks.text:
H. No. 6102 / 60 OG No. 8, 1095 (February 24, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3840, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY HUNDRED EIGHTY-NINE, ENTITLED "AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR ASSISTANCE TO THE GOLD MINING INDUSTRY."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section six of Republic Act Numbered Thirty hundred eighty-nine, otherwise known as "The Gold Mining Industry Assistance Act of 1961," is hereby amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 6.

Term.

&mdashThis direct assistance shall be effective for a period of six years from the date of approval of this Act."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
